subject: feat(phase3-7): add signature log, notifications, PDF, splitting, nudge/expiry, error handling
body:
Complete frontend implementation for Phases 3 (remaining), 4, 5, 6, and 7:
- Signature log with IP/user agent/timestamp tracking
- In-app notification system with bell icon and dropdown panel
- PDF preview with SHA-256 verification codes
- Agreement splitting (copy modules to new agreement)
- Module nudge period and auto-expire configuration
- Error boundary for React render error recovery
- Offline indicator for network status
- Agreement status management (Start, Reopen)

Tags: signing, notifications, pdf, splitting, nudge, error-handling, offline, phase3, phase4, phase5, phase6, phase7
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mvp-frontend
Semver: minor
